name: @narada2/runtime-introspection-mcp
description: Narada-owned runtime trace and session composition analysis MCP surface.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @narada2/mcp-e2e-harness build && pnpm build && node dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node dist/test/runtime-introspection-mcp.test.js && node dist/test/site-fabric-introspection-e2e.test.js
